name: Thornwall
description: The capital of the Sylvan Reach, grown rather than built from living thorns and ancient oak by centuries of druidic magic. The city's walls are a tangle of razor-sharp brambles that obey the Sylvan Council's will, opening for allies and crushing intruders.

properties.government: The Sylvan Council from the Heartwood Throne
properties.defenses: Living thorn walls, awakened tree sentinels, and fey wards
properties.notableFeature: The Heartwood Throne — a sentient tree that serves as seat of power
